summary.zh: 修复 Windows 受限执行环境无法启动命令的问题，并加强真实 Windows 发布校验，减少安装包发布后才发现沙箱不可用的风险。
summary.en: Fix command startup in the restricted Windows environment and strengthen real Windows release verification, reducing the risk of shipping an installer with an unusable sandbox.

title.zh: Windows 沙箱命令恢复启动

summary.zh: Windows 受限执行环境现在会保留进程初始化所需的最小权限和句柄契约，同时继续限制文件写入范围；PowerShell 会在显式 Unicode 环境和原子 Job 归属下直接无窗口启动，发布流程也会在真实 Windows 环境中启动打包后的沙箱命令。
summary.en: The restricted Windows environment now preserves the minimum privileges and handle contract needed for process initialization while keeping file writes scoped; PowerShell starts directly without a console window using an explicit Unicode environment and atomic Job membership, and releases start the packaged sandbox command on real Windows.

sources.title: fix(windows): use a private WinSta0 desktop
